case_title: PREMIER BUILDING MAINTENANCE, INC. VS. WORLD'S GYM, FORMALLY DIESEL FITNESS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PREMIER BUILDING MAINTENANCE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WORLD'S GYM, FORMALLY DIESEL FITNESS $4,691.55 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,751.55, THE COURT DETERMINE THAT OWNERSHIP OF THE BUSINESS CHANGED AT CLOSE OF THE BUSINESS ESCROW ON JAN. 25, 2008 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,970.00 FILED BY PREMIER BUILDING MAINTENANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WORLD'S GYM, FORMALLY DIESEL FITNESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PREMIER BUILDING MAINTENANCE, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WORLD'S GYM, FORMALLY DIESEL FITNESS
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-27-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-27-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE RECEIVED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-27-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, DUPLICATE ENTRY. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PREMIER BUILDING MAINTENANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT WORLD'S GYM, FORMALLY DIESEL FITNESS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-21-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WORLD'S GYM, FORMALLY DIESEL FITNESS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2008 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JUN-27-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. REQUEST FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE GIVEN TO DEFENDANT IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE INFORMATION REQUESTED BY THE COURT FOR THE COMMISSIONER, RECEIVED & FILED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WORLD'S GYM, FORMALLY DIESEL FITNESS
